value.found_quote: To review a diff locally in your terminal without installing the GitHub App, run the `/code-review` command in any Claude Code session. See [Review a diff locally](#review-a-diff-locally).
value.rationale: The claim is about a "Review your code" feature that evaluates diffs. The page describes Code Review, which analyzes code diffs and can review a diff locally via the `/code-review` command. The overall Code Review feature is described as being "in research preview." The claim's parenthetical "(desktop)" is loosely matched by the local terminal review in a Claude Code session, though the page does not use the word "desktop" or "commit" specifically; it reviews diffs (including PRs and local diffs). The core offering — reviewing code by evaluating diffs — is clearly substantiated.
